title: TurtleWare
excerpt: Tagged as retrocomputing, amiga, gcc, linux
content_html:
Tagged as retrocomputing, amiga, gcc, linux

Written on 2026-07-20 by Daniel Kochmański

Table of Contents

  1. Prerequisites
  2. Toolchain
  3. Emulator
  4. Installation
  5. Running executables
  6. Remote debugging
  7. Summary
  8. Resources

Apropos of nothing, I decided to set up an Amiga development environment. Since figuring things out wasn't straightforward, I wrote down instructions for Linux about how to compile the first program and run it in an emulator. Enjoy!

Prerequisites

In this post I'm assuming that the reader is a proficient Linux user who can build software from source code and figure out missing dependencies. Standard build tools should be sufficient to get started. Basic understanding of shell commands is also expected. More detailed instructions on how to build the toolchain are available here: https://franke.ms/amiga/amiga-gcc.wiki.

Another rather problematic requirement is that to run AmigaOS, you need ROM images (firmware) and workbench disks (installation media). They may be bought from legal sources or dumped from owned hardware. Alternatively one could use the AROS ROM that is shipped with the emulator, although it is known to have worse compatibility with standard Amiga software.

Toolchain

To build programs for AmigaOS we need the compiler. A popular tool is amiga-gcc. First I tried to use the default (the most battle-tested) GCC branch, but while the produced executable worked, loading the binary in m68k-amigaos-gdb caused a segmentation fault. After some trial and error I reported the issue and the toolchain maintainer, Stefan 'bebbo' Franke, kindly explained that the toolchain now produces DWARF2 debug info and then fixed a bug in embedding debug sections in the final executable. I've finally settled on a branch amiga16.1 for GCC and on a branch amiga-2.46 for binutils (it contains the abovementioned fix).

Note that make update may fail due to connection errors. In that case rerun it until everything is downloaded. Both make update and make all may take some time - on my machine everything takes about 1 hour.

export WORKSPACE=${HOME}/Workshop/AmigaOS
export TOOLCHAIN=${WORKSPACE}/amiga-gcc-toolchain
export PREFIX=${TOOLCHAIN}
mkdir -p ${WORKSPACE}
cd ${WORKSPACE}
git clone https://franke.ms/git/bebbo/amiga-gcc.git
pushd amiga-gcc
make branch branch=amiga16.1 mod=gcc
make branch branch=amiga-2.46 mod=binutils
make update
make all
# Check whether the compiler works. SDL1.2 build failed on my host, but it is
# not needed.
${TOOLCHAIN}/bin/m68k-amigaos-gcc -v
popd

Now we have a working AmigaOS toolchain. It supports a few different runtime/libc versions. When nothing is specified it defaults to newlib.

export WORKSPACE=${HOME}/Workshop/AmigaOS
export TOOLCHAIN=${WORKSPACE}/amiga-gcc-toolchain
export PATH=${TOOLCHAIN}/bin:${PATH}
mkdir Shared
pushd Shared
cat > woosh.c <<EOF
#include <stdio.h>

void hi(void) {
  printf("jd was here \\\o/\n");
}

int main() {
  hi();
  return 0;
}
EOF
m68k-amigaos-gcc -g woosh.c -o woosh.out
file woosh.out
# woosh.out: AmigaOS loadseg()ble executable/binary
popd

Congratulations! We've just built our first AmigaOS program. It seems that file has a bit of a problem parsing AmigaOS executables, but the binary works.

Emulator

Now how to run this file? We need two pieces:

  • the emulator
  • AmigaOS ROMs

Obtaining the emulator is straightforward. I picked Amiberry, because it provides a good developer experience - built-in bsdsocket.library, virtual hard disks and shared directories, and it works well on Linux. Another good contender is FS-UAE. Both should work well. They have binary releases or we can build them from source. We'll install Amiberry from Flathub:

flatpak install flathub com.blitterstudio.amiberry

Obtaining ROMs is a bit harder. If you own the original hardware you may already have a legal dump. Otherwise you may buy them from https://www.amigaforever.com/ or https://www.hyperion-entertainment.com/. Assuming that you have ROMs, we may start the emulator and configure our target system.

We need the following files:

  • ROM file: kick.a1200.46.143
  • floppies: Install314.adf, Workbench314.adf, etc
mkdir -p Amiberry/{ROMs,Floppies}
# Amiberry expects .a1200 file extension (it doesn't recognize .46.143)
cp Nero/ROMs/kick.a1200.46.143 Amiberry/ROMs/kick.a1200
cp Nero/Floppies/*.adf Amiberry/Floppies
flatpak run com.blitterstudio.amiberry

Now navigate to the "Paths" tab and configure them to point to the directory "Amiberry" that we just created. Confirm when prompted to create subdirectories. Then click the "Rescan Paths" button and go back to the "Quickstart" tab.

Amiga hardware has a few distinct flavors with different hardware configurations and running variations of M68K CPU. RAM is divided between the "chip memory" that is accessible directly by custom chips (graphics, audio and DMA) and "fast memory" - general-purpose RAM. The first one is usually 1-2 MB, while the latter can typically be expanded to something like 4 MB of Fast RAM. That's plenty! We will pick Amiga 1200, because it has AGA (Amiga Advanced Graphics Architecture) chipset and 4 MB Fast RAM expanded configuration.

  • Model: Amiga 1200
  • Configuration: 4 MB Fast RAM expanded configuration
  • Emulated Drives (DF0): Install314.adf

While installing, the floppy will need to be replaced by files requested by the installer. The emulated drive DF0 represents the floppy drive. To get back to the configuration menu while the virtual machine is running, press F12.

Then navigate to the "ROM" tab and select kick.a1200 ROM as the "Main ROM File". Then go to "Expansions" tab and enable bsdsocket.library. We'll need TCP/IP connection later to run bgdbserver.

Finally add a virtual hard drive and a shared directory:

  1. Navigate to "Hard drives/CD" tab
  2. Select "Create Hardfile" :: 1024MB, RDB Mode enabled
  3. Select "Add Hardfile" and select the newly created file
  4. Select "Add Directory"

These drives will be visible in Amiga as DH0 and DH1, respectively. RDB is Amiga's native partition table format (something like MBR in PCs but richer). Setting this mode is necessary for Amiga to recognize the disk.

It is worth saving the configuration. Go to the tab "Configurations" and save the file. From now on we can start AmigaOS as:

flatpak run com.blitterstudio.amiberry -f amigaos.uae

Installation

I ran into some problems with formatting the hard disk. Generally when the installer opens, the new disk should be visible in the initial directory as "DH0: …". Click on the icon with the left pointer button, then hold the right pointer button to reveal the top menu bar. Navigate to "Icons > FormatDisk" and format the disk.

Now follow steps in the installer. Sometimes we need to "insert a new floppy". To return to the Amiberry menu press F12 and swap the floppy image in DF0 with the one suggested by the installer. Then click "Resume" and carry on.

Great job, we have successfully installed AmigaOS! We may now remove the floppy disk and boot into the installed system.

Running executables

Now that the system is rebooted, go to the drive we installed the system in, select "System" and "Shell". The binary woosh.out is already in the shared directory which is available as "DH1", because we have added it as the second drive (after the "Hardfile").

3.Main:> dh1:
3.DH1:> dir
  woosh.out
3.DH1:> woosh.out
jd was here \o/
3.DH1:>

That's fantastic, our cross-compiled binary works like a charm!

Remote debugging

But that's not the whole story. Software breaks, and when software breaks we want the debugger. We've already built one with m68k-amigaos-gdb, but there is no GDB server on the system. Stefan Franke, the maintainer of the m68k-amigaos toolchain, also maintains bgdbserver, a port dedicated to Amiga.

Before using it, we need to install a tool to extract lha archives. It is available here: https://aminet.net/package/util/arc/lha. Download and copy the file lha.run in the Shared/ directory and run it inside Amiga. lha.run is a self-extracting archive and creates a couple of files. We are interested in the file lha_68020. Copy it to c:lha. Note that c: is not "Drive C", but rather "Commands directory".

3.DH1:> lha.run
...
3.DH1:> copy lha_68020 c:lha

We can now remove the extracted files and download bgdbserver.lha from https://aminet.net/dev/debug/bgdbserver.lha. Put the archive in the Shared/ directory and extract it.

3.DH1:> lha x bgdbserver.lha
3.DH1:> copy bgdbserver/bgdbserver c:

Now, finally, we can start the application in debug mode:

    3.DH1:> bgdbserver :4444 woosh.out

Splendid! Now we can debug our ambitious program. On the Linux host, run GDB with the same binary:

export WORKSPACE=${HOME}/Workshop/AmigaOS
export TOOLCHAIN=${WORKSPACE}/amiga-gcc-toolchain
export PATH=${TOOLCHAIN}/bin:${PATH}
m68k-amigaos-gdb
(gdb) file woosh.out
(gdb) target remote localhost:4444
(gdb) continue

If you hit a "Connection refused" error, make sure bsdsocket.library is enabled in Amiberry configuration (as mentioned earlier).

The next logical step is to make AmigaOS pretty, but it is outside of the scope of this tutorial. I followed this guide that covers the topic in detail: https://lyonsden.net/installing-amiga-os-3-1-4-part-5-finishing-touches/

Summary

We've successfully built and installed the development environment for AmigaOS. I wonder what a motivated Lisp hacker could do with it?

Resources

While configuring this setup, I've primarily learned from these resources:

  • https://franke.ms/amiga/amiga-gcc.wiki: toolchain homepage
  • https://github.com/BlitterStudio/amiberry/wiki: emulator wiki
  • https://guide.abime.net/wb3.1/chap2.htm: partitioning guide
  • https://guide.abime.net/wb3.1/chap4.htm: installing lha.run
  • https://aminet.net/: package repository
  • https://lyonsden.net/installing-amiga-os-3-1-4-part-5-finishing-touches/: a detailed guide explaining how to make AmigaOS look pretty

sentences.zh: 该文件在解析 AmigaOS 可执行文件时似乎有点问题，但二进制文件可以工作。

sentences.en: Emulator
sentences.zh: 模拟器

blocks.html_en: Now how to run this file? We need two pieces:

sentences.en: Now how to run this file?
sentences.zh: 现在如何运行这个文件？

sentences.en: We need two pieces:
sentences.zh: 我们需要两块：

sentences.en: the emulator
sentences.zh: 模拟器

sentences.en: AmigaOS ROMs
sentences.zh: AmigaOS ROM

blocks.html_en: Obtaining the emulator is straightforward. I picked Amiberry, because it provides a good developer experience - built-in bsdsocket.library, virtual hard disks and shared directories, and it works well on Linux. Another good contender is FS-UAE. Both should work well. They have binary releases or we can build them from source. We'll install Amiberry from Flathub:

sentences.en: Obtaining the emulator is straightforward.
sentences.zh: 获取模拟器很简单。

sentences.en: I picked Amiberry, because it provides a good developer experience - built-in bsdsocket.library, virtual hard disks and shared directories, and it works well on Linux.
sentences.zh: 我选择Amiberry，因为它提供了良好的开发体验——内置bsdsocket.library、虚拟硬盘和共享目录，并且在Linux上运行良好。

sentences.en: Another good contender is FS-UAE.
sentences.zh: 另一个不错的竞争者是 FS-UAE。

sentences.en: Both should work well.
sentences.zh: 两者都应该运作良好。

sentences.en: They have binary releases or we can build them from source.
sentences.zh: 它们有二进制版本，或者我们可以从源代码构建它们。

sentences.en: We'll install Amiberry from Flathub:
sentences.zh: 我们将从 Flathub 安装 Amiberry：

blocks.html_en: Obtaining ROMs is a bit harder. If you own the original hardware you may already have a legal dump. Otherwise you may buy them from https://www.amigaforever.com/ or https://www.hyperion-entertainment.com/. Assuming that you have ROMs, we may start the emulator and configure our target system.

sentences.en: Obtaining ROMs is a bit harder.
sentences.zh: 获取 ROM 有点困难。

sentences.en: If you own the original hardware you may already have a legal dump.
sentences.zh: 如果您拥有原始硬件，您可能已经拥有合法的转储。

sentences.en: Otherwise you may buy them from https://www.amigaforever.com/ or https://www.hyperion-entertainment.com/. Assuming that you have ROMs, we may start the emulator and configure our target system.
sentences.zh: 否则，您可以从 https://www.amigaforever.com/ 或 https://www.hyperion-entertainment.com/ 购买。假设您有 ROM，我们可以启动模拟器并配置我们的目标系统。

sentences.en: We need the following files:
sentences.zh: 我们需要以下文件：

sentences.en: ROM file: kick.a1200.46.143
sentences.zh: ROM文件：kick.a1200.46.143

sentences.en: floppies: Install314.adf, Workbench314.adf, etc
sentences.zh: 软盘：Install314.adf、Workbench314.adf 等

blocks.html_en: Now navigate to the "Paths" tab and configure them to point to the directory "Amiberry" that we just created. Confirm when prompted to create subdirectories. Then click the "Rescan Paths" button and go back to the "Quickstart" tab.

sentences.en: Now navigate to the "Paths" tab and configure them to point to the directory "Amiberry" that we just created.
sentences.zh: 现在导航到“路径”选项卡并将它们配置为指向我们刚刚创建的目录“Amiberry”。

sentences.en: Confirm when prompted to create subdirectories.
sentences.zh: 当提示创建子目录时确认。

sentences.en: Then click the "Rescan Paths" button and go back to the "Quickstart" tab.
sentences.zh: 然后单击“重新扫描路径”按钮并返回“快速启动”选项卡。

blocks.html_en: Amiga hardware has a few distinct flavors with different hardware configurations and running variations of M68K CPU. RAM is divided between the "chip memory" that is accessible directly by custom chips (graphics, audio and DMA) and "fast memory" - general-purpose RAM. The first one is usually 1-2 MB, while the latter can typically be expanded to something like 4 MB of Fast RAM. That's plenty! We will pick Amiga 1200, because it has AGA (Amiga Advanced Graphics Architecture) chipset and 4 MB Fast RAM expanded configuration.

sentences.en: Amiga hardware has a few distinct flavors with different hardware configurations and running variations of M68K CPU.
sentences.zh: Amiga 硬件具有几种不同的风格，具有不同的硬件配置和运行的 M68K CPU 变体。

sentences.en: RAM is divided between the "chip memory" that is accessible directly by custom chips (graphics, audio and DMA) and "fast memory" - general-purpose RAM.
sentences.zh: RAM 分为可直接由定制芯片（图形、音频和 DMA）访问的“芯片内存”和“快速内存”（通用 RAM）。

sentences.en: The first one is usually 1-2 MB, while the latter can typically be expanded to something like 4 MB of Fast RAM.
sentences.zh: 第一个通常是 1-2 MB，而后者通常可以扩展到 4 MB 的快速 RAM。

sentences.en: That's plenty!
sentences.zh: 够了！

sentences.en: We will pick Amiga 1200, because it has AGA (Amiga Advanced Graphics Architecture) chipset and 4 MB Fast RAM expanded configuration.
sentences.zh: 我们会选择 Amiga 1200，因为它具有 AGA（Amiga 高级图形架构）芯片组和 4 MB 快速 RAM 扩展配置。

sentences.en: Model: Amiga 1200
sentences.zh: 型号：Amiga 1200

sentences.en: Configuration: 4 MB Fast RAM expanded configuration
sentences.zh: 配置：4 MB 快速 RAM 扩展配置

sentences.en: Emulated Drives (DF0): Install314.adf
sentences.zh: 模拟驱动器 (DF0)：Install314.adf

blocks.html_en: While installing, the floppy will need to be replaced by files requested by the installer. The emulated drive DF0 represents the floppy drive. To get back to the configuration menu while the virtual machine is running, press F12.

sentences.en: While installing, the floppy will need to be replaced by files requested by the installer.
sentences.zh: 安装时，需要用安装程序请求的文件替换软盘。

sentences.en: The emulated drive DF0 represents the floppy drive.
sentences.zh: 模拟驱动器 DF0 代表软盘驱动器。

sentences.en: To get back to the configuration menu while the virtual machine is running, press F12.
sentences.zh: 要在虚拟机运行时返回配置菜单，请按 F12。

blocks.html_en: Then navigate to the "ROM" tab and select kick.a1200 ROM as the "Main ROM File". Then go to "Expansions" tab and enable bsdsocket.library. We'll need TCP/IP connection later to run bgdbserver.

sentences.en: Then navigate to the "ROM" tab and select kick.a1200 ROM as the "Main ROM File".
sentences.zh: 然后导航到“ROM”选项卡并选择 kick.a1200 ROM 作为“Main ROM File”。

sentences.en: Then go to "Expansions" tab and enable bsdsocket.library.
sentences.zh: 然后转到“扩展”选项卡并启用 bsdsocket.library。

sentences.en: We'll need TCP/IP connection later to run bgdbserver.
sentences.zh: 稍后我们将需要 TCP/IP 连接来运行 bgdbserver。

blocks.html_en: Finally add a virtual hard drive and a shared directory:

sentences.en: Finally add a virtual hard drive and a shared directory:
sentences.zh: 最后添加虚拟硬盘和共享目录：

sentences.en: Navigate to "Hard drives/CD" tab
sentences.zh: 导航到“硬盘驱动器/CD”选项卡

sentences.en: Select "Create Hardfile" :: 1024MB, RDB Mode enabled
sentences.zh: 选择“创建硬盘”::1024MB，启用 RDB 模式

blocks.html_en: • Select "Add Hardfile" and select the newly created file

sentences.en: Select "Add Hardfile" and select the newly created file
sentences.zh: 选择“添加硬文件”并选择新创建的文件

sentences.en: Select "Add Directory"
sentences.zh: 选择“添加目录”

blocks.html_en: These drives will be visible in Amiga as DH0 and DH1, respectively. RDB is Amiga's native partition table format (something like MBR in PCs but richer). Setting this mode is necessary for Amiga to recognize the disk.

sentences.en: These drives will be visible in Amiga as DH0 and DH1, respectively.
sentences.zh: 这些驱动器在 Amiga 中将分别显示为 DH0 和 DH1。

sentences.en: RDB is Amiga's native partition table format (something like MBR in PCs but richer).
sentences.zh: RDB 是 Amiga 的原生分区表格式（类似于 PC 中的 MBR，但更丰富）。

sentences.en: Setting this mode is necessary for Amiga to recognize the disk.
sentences.zh: 设置此模式对于 Amiga 识别磁盘是必要的。

blocks.html_en: It is worth saving the configuration. Go to the tab "Configurations" and save the file. From now on we can start AmigaOS as:

sentences.en: It is worth saving the configuration.
sentences.zh: 值得保存配置。

sentences.en: Go to the tab "Configurations" and save the file.
sentences.zh: 转到“配置”选项卡并保存文件。

sentences.en: From now on we can start AmigaOS as:
sentences.zh: 从现在开始，我们可以启动 AmigaOS：

sentences.en: Installation
sentences.zh: 安装

blocks.html_en: I ran into some problems with formatting the hard disk. Generally when the installer opens, the new disk should be visible in the initial directory as "DH0: …". Click on the icon with the left pointer button, then hold the right pointer button to reveal the top menu bar. Navigate to "Icons > FormatDisk" and format the disk.

sentences.en: I ran into some problems with formatting the hard disk.
sentences.zh: 我在格式化硬盘时遇到了一些问题。

sentences.en: Generally when the installer opens, the new disk should be visible in the initial directory as "DH0: …".
sentences.zh: 通常，当安装程序打开时，新磁盘应在初始目录中显示为“DH0：...”。

sentences.en: Click on the icon with the left pointer button, then hold the right pointer button to reveal the top menu bar.
sentences.zh: 用左指针按钮单击图标，然后按住右指针按钮以显示顶部菜单栏。

sentences.en: Navigate to "Icons > FormatDisk" and format the disk.
sentences.zh: 导航至“图标 > FormatDisk”并格式化磁盘。

blocks.html_en: Now follow steps in the installer. Sometimes we need to "insert a new floppy". To return to the Amiberry menu press F12 and swap the floppy image in DF0 with the one suggested by the installer. Then click "Resume" and carry on.

sentences.en: Now follow steps in the installer.
sentences.zh: 现在按照安装程序中的步骤进行操作。

sentences.en: Sometimes we need to "insert a new floppy".
sentences.zh: 有时我们需要“插入新软盘”。

sentences.en: To return to the Amiberry menu press F12 and swap the floppy image in DF0 with the one suggested by the installer.
sentences.zh: 要返回 Amiberry 菜单，请按 F12 并将 DF0 中的软盘映像与安装程序建议的映像交换。

sentences.en: Then click "Resume" and carry on.
sentences.zh: 然后单击“继续”并继续。

blocks.html_en: Great job, we have successfully installed AmigaOS! We may now remove the floppy disk and boot into the installed system.

sentences.en: Great job, we have successfully installed AmigaOS!
sentences.zh: 干得好，我们已经成功安装 AmigaOS！

sentences.en: We may now remove the floppy disk and boot into the installed system.
sentences.zh: 我们现在可以取出软盘并启动到已安装的系统。

sentences.en: Running executables
sentences.zh: 运行可执行文件

blocks.html_en: Now that the system is rebooted, go to the drive we installed the system in, select "System" and "Shell". The binary woosh.out is already in the shared directory which is available as "DH1", because we have added it as the second drive (after the "Hardfile").

sentences.en: Now that the system is rebooted, go to the drive we installed the system in, select "System" and "Shell".
sentences.zh: 现在系统已重新启动，转到我们安装系统的驱动器，选择“系统”和“Shell”。

sentences.en: The binary woosh.out is already in the shared directory which is available as "DH1", because we have added it as the second drive (after the "Hardfile").
sentences.zh: 二进制 woosh.out 已经位于共享目录中，该目录可作为“DH1”使用，因为我们已将其添加为第二个驱动器（在“Hardfile”之后）。

blocks.html_en: That's fantastic, our cross-compiled binary works like a charm!

sentences.en: That's fantastic, our cross-compiled binary works like a charm!
sentences.zh: 太棒了，我们的交叉编译二进制文件非常神奇！

sentences.en: Remote debugging
sentences.zh: 远程调试

blocks.html_en: But that's not the whole story. Software breaks, and when software breaks we want the debugger. We've already built one with m68k-amigaos-gdb, but there is no GDB server on the system. Stefan Franke, the maintainer of the m68k-amigaos toolchain, also maintains bgdbserver, a port dedicated to Amiga.

sentences.en: But that's not the whole story.
sentences.zh: 但这还不是故事的全部。

sentences.en: Software breaks, and when software breaks we want the debugger.
sentences.zh: 软件中断，当软件中断时我们需要调试器。

sentences.en: We've already built one with m68k-amigaos-gdb, but there is no GDB server on the system.
sentences.zh: 我们已经用 m68k-amigaos-gdb 构建了一个，但系统上没有 GDB 服务器。

sentences.en: Stefan Franke, the maintainer of the m68k-amigaos toolchain, also maintains bgdbserver, a port dedicated to Amiga.
sentences.zh: m68k-amigaos 工具链的维护者 Stefan Franke 还维护 bgdbserver，这是一个专用于 Amiga 的端口。

blocks.html_en: Before using it, we need to install a tool to extract lha archives. It is available here: https://aminet.net/package/util/arc/lha. Download and copy the file lha.run in the Shared/ directory and run it inside Amiga. lha.run is a self-extracting archive and creates a couple of files. We are interested in the file lha_68020. Copy it to c:lha. Note that c: is not "Drive C", but rather "Commands directory".

sentences.en: Before using it, we need to install a tool to extract lha archives.
sentences.zh: 在使用它之前，我们需要安装一个工具来提取lha档案。

sentences.en: It is available here: https://aminet.net/package/util/arc/lha. Download and copy the file lha.run in the Shared/ directory and run it inside Amiga.
sentences.zh: 它可以在这里找到：https://aminet.net/package/util/arc/lha。下载并复制 Shared/ 目录中的 lha.run 文件，然后在 Amiga 中运行它。

sentences.en: lha.run is a self-extracting archive and creates a couple of files.
sentences.zh: lha.run 是一个自解压存档并创建几个文件。

sentences.en: We are interested in the file lha_68020.
sentences.zh: 我们对文件 lha_68020 感兴趣。

sentences.en: Copy it to c:lha.
sentences.zh: 将其复制到 c:lha。

sentences.en: Note that c: is not "Drive C", but rather "Commands directory".
sentences.zh: 请注意，c: 不是“C 盘”，而是“命令目录”。

blocks.html_en: We can now remove the extracted files and download bgdbserver.lha from https://aminet.net/dev/debug/bgdbserver.lha. Put the archive in the Shared/ directory and extract it.

sentences.en: We can now remove the extracted files and download bgdbserver.lha from https://aminet.net/dev/debug/bgdbserver.lha. Put the archive in the Shared/ directory and extract it.
sentences.zh: 我们现在可以删除提取的文件并从 https://aminet.net/dev/debug/bgdbserver.lha 下载 bgdbserver.lha。将存档放在 Shared/ 目录中并解压。

blocks.html_en: Now, finally, we can start the application in debug mode:

sentences.en: Now, finally, we can start the application in debug mode:
sentences.zh: 现在，我们终于可以在调试模式下启动应用程序了：

blocks.html_en: Splendid! Now we can debug our ambitious program. On the Linux host, run GDB with the same binary:

sentences.en: Splendid!
sentences.zh: 灿烂！

sentences.en: Now we can debug our ambitious program.
sentences.zh: 现在我们可以调试我们雄心勃勃的程序了。

sentences.en: On the Linux host, run GDB with the same binary:
sentences.zh: 在 Linux 主机上，使用相同的二进制文件运行 GDB：

blocks.html_en: If you hit a "Connection refused" error, make sure bsdsocket.library is enabled in Amiberry configuration (as mentioned earlier).

sentences.en: If you hit a "Connection refused" error, make sure bsdsocket.library is enabled in Amiberry configuration (as mentioned earlier).
sentences.zh: 如果遇到“连接被拒绝”错误，请确保在 Amiberry 配置中启用 bsdsocket.library（如前所述）。

blocks.html_en: The next logical step is to make AmigaOS pretty, but it is outside of the scope of this tutorial. I followed this guide that covers the topic in detail: https://lyonsden.net/installing-amiga-os-3-1-4-part-5-finishing-touches/

sentences.en: The next logical step is to make AmigaOS pretty, but it is outside of the scope of this tutorial.
sentences.zh: 下一个合乎逻辑的步骤是让 AmigaOS 变得漂亮，但这超出了本教程的范围。

sentences.en: I followed this guide that covers the topic in detail: https://lyonsden.net/installing-amiga-os-3-1-4-part-5-finishing-touches/
sentences.zh: 我按照本指南详细介绍了该主题：https://lyonsden.net/installing-amiga-os-3-1-4-part-5-finishing-touches/

sentences.en: Summary
sentences.zh: 概括

blocks.html_en: We've successfully built and installed the development environment for AmigaOS. I wonder what a motivated Lisp hacker could do with it?

sentences.en: We've successfully built and installed the development environment for AmigaOS.
sentences.zh: 我们已经成功构建并安装了AmigaOS的开发环境。

sentences.en: I wonder what a motivated Lisp hacker could do with it?
sentences.zh: 我想知道一个积极的 Lisp 黑客可以用它做什么？

sentences.en: Resources
sentences.zh: 资源

blocks.html_en: While configuring this setup, I've primarily learned from these resources:

sentences.en: While configuring this setup, I've primarily learned from these resources:
sentences.zh: 在配置此设置时，我主要从以下资源中学习：

sentences.en: https://franke.ms/amiga/amiga-gcc.wiki: toolchain homepage
sentences.zh: https://franke.ms/amiga/amiga-gcc.wiki：工具链主页

sentences.en: https://github.com/BlitterStudio/amiberry/wiki: emulator wiki
sentences.zh: https://github.com/BlitterStudio/amiberry/wiki：wiki 模拟器

sentences.en: https://guide.abime.net/wb3.1/chap2.htm: partitioning guide
sentences.zh: https://guide.abime.net/wb3.1/chap2.htm：分区指南

sentences.en: https://guide.abime.net/wb3.1/chap4.htm: installing lha.run
sentences.zh: https://guide.abime.net/wb3.1/chap4.htm：安装lha.run

sentences.en: https://aminet.net/: package repository
sentences.zh: https://aminet.net/：包存储库

blocks.html_en: • https://lyonsden.net/installing-amiga-os-3-1-4-part-5-finishing-touches/: a detailed guide explaining how to make AmigaOS look pretty

sentences.en: https://lyonsden.net/installing-amiga-os-3-1-4-part-5-finishing-touches/: a detailed guide explaining how to make AmigaOS look pretty
sentences.zh: https://lyonsden.net/installing-amiga-os-3-1-4-part-5-finishing-touches/：详细指南解释如何使 AmigaOS 看起来漂亮

content_html_zh:
标记为 逆向计算, amiga, gcc, linux

撰写于 2026-07-20 作者：丹尼尔·科赫曼斯基

目录

  1. 先决条件
  2. 工具链
  3. 模拟器
  4. 安装
  5. 运行可执行文件
  6. 远程调试
  7. 概括
  8. 资源

无缘无故，我决定搭建一个Amiga开发环境。 由于弄清楚事情并不简单，我写下了有关如何编译第一个程序并在模拟器中运行它的 Linux 说明。 享受！

先决条件

在这篇文章中，我假设读者是一位熟练的 Linux 用户，可以从源代码构建软件并找出缺失的依赖项。 标准构建工具应该足以开始使用。 还需要对 shell 命令有基本的了解。 有关如何构建工具链的更多详细说明，请访问：https://franke.ms/amiga/amiga-gcc.wiki。

另一个相当有问题的要求是，要运行 AmigaOS，您需要 ROM 映像（固件）和工作台磁盘（安装介质）。 它们可能是从合法来源购买的，也可能是从拥有的硬件中丢弃的。 另一种方法是使用仿真器附带的 AROS ROM，尽管众所周知它与标准 Amiga 软件的兼容性较差。

工具链

要为 AmigaOS 构建程序，我们需要编译器。 一个流行的工具是 amiga-gcc。 首先，我尝试使用默认的（经过最考验的）GCC 分支，但是虽然生成的可执行文件有效，但在 m68k-amigaos-gdb 中加载二进制文件导致了分段错误。 经过一番尝试和错误后，我报告了这个问题，工具链维护者 Stefan 'bebbo' Franke 善意地解释说，工具链现在生成 DWARF2 调试信息，然后修复了在最终可执行文件中嵌入调试部分的错误。 我最终选择了 GCC 的 amiga16.1 分支和 binutils 的 amiga-2.46 分支（它包含上述修复）。

请注意，make update 可能会因连接错误而失败。 在这种情况下，请重新运行它，直到下载完所有内容。 make update 和 make all 都可能需要一些时间 - 在我的机器上，一切大约需要 1 小时。

export WORKSPACE=${HOME}/Workshop/AmigaOS
export TOOLCHAIN=${WORKSPACE}/amiga-gcc-toolchain
export PREFIX=${TOOLCHAIN}
mkdir -p ${WORKSPACE}
cd ${WORKSPACE}
git clone https://franke.ms/git/bebbo/amiga-gcc.git
pushd amiga-gcc
make branch branch=amiga16.1 mod=gcc
make branch branch=amiga-2.46 mod=binutils
make update
make all
# Check whether the compiler works. SDL1.2 build failed on my host, but it is
# not needed.
${TOOLCHAIN}/bin/m68k-amigaos-gcc -v
popd

现在我们有了一个可用的 AmigaOS 工具链。 它支持一些不同的运行时/libc 版本。 如果未指定任何内容，则默认为 newlib。

export WORKSPACE=${HOME}/Workshop/AmigaOS
export TOOLCHAIN=${WORKSPACE}/amiga-gcc-toolchain
export PATH=${TOOLCHAIN}/bin:${PATH}
mkdir Shared
pushd Shared
cat > woosh.c <<EOF
#include <stdio.h>

void hi(void) {
  printf("jd was here \\\o/\n");
}

int main() {
  hi();
  return 0;
}
EOF
m68k-amigaos-gcc -g woosh.c -o woosh.out
file woosh.out
# woosh.out: AmigaOS loadseg()ble executable/binary
popd

恭喜！ 我们刚刚构建了第一个 AmigaOS 程序。 该文件在解析 AmigaOS 可执行文件时似乎有点问题，但二进制文件可以工作。

模拟器

现在如何运行这个文件？ 我们需要两块：

  • 模拟器
  • AmigaOS ROM

获取模拟器很简单。 我选择Amiberry，因为它提供了良好的开发体验——内置bsdsocket.library、虚拟硬盘和共享目录，并且在Linux上运行良好。 另一个不错的竞争者是 FS-UAE。 两者都应该运作良好。 它们有二进制版本，或者我们可以从源代码构建它们。 我们将从 Flathub 安装 Amiberry：

flatpak install flathub com.blitterstudio.amiberry

获取 ROM 有点困难。 如果您拥有原始硬件，您可能已经拥有合法的转储。 否则，您可以从 https://www.amigaforever.com/ 或 https://www.hyperion-entertainment.com/ 购买。假设您有 ROM，我们可以启动模拟器并配置我们的目标系统。

我们需要以下文件：

  • ROM文件：kick.a1200.46.143
  • 软盘：Install314.adf、Workbench314.adf 等
mkdir -p Amiberry/{ROMs,Floppies}
# Amiberry expects .a1200 file extension (it doesn't recognize .46.143)
cp Nero/ROMs/kick.a1200.46.143 Amiberry/ROMs/kick.a1200
cp Nero/Floppies/*.adf Amiberry/Floppies
flatpak run com.blitterstudio.amiberry

现在导航到“路径”选项卡并将它们配置为指向我们刚刚创建的目录“Amiberry”。 当提示创建子目录时确认。 然后单击“重新扫描路径”按钮并返回“快速启动”选项卡。

Amiga 硬件具有几种不同的风格，具有不同的硬件配置和运行的 M68K CPU 变体。 RAM 分为可直接由定制芯片（图形、音频和 DMA）访问的“芯片内存”和“快速内存”（通用 RAM）。 第一个通常是 1-2 MB，而后者通常可以扩展到 4 MB 的快速 RAM。 够了！ 我们会选择 Amiga 1200，因为它具有 AGA（Amiga 高级图形架构）芯片组和 4 MB 快速 RAM 扩展配置。

  • 型号：Amiga 1200
  • 配置：4 MB 快速 RAM 扩展配置
  • 模拟驱动器 (DF0)：Install314.adf

安装时，需要用安装程序请求的文件替换软盘。 模拟驱动器 DF0 代表软盘驱动器。 要在虚拟机运行时返回配置菜单，请按 F12。

然后导航到“ROM”选项卡并选择 kick.a1200 ROM 作为“Main ROM File”。 然后转到“扩展”选项卡并启用 bsdsocket.library。 稍后我们将需要 TCP/IP 连接来运行 bgdbserver。

最后添加虚拟硬盘和共享目录：

  1. 导航到“硬盘驱动器/CD”选项卡
  2. 选择“创建硬盘”::1024MB，启用 RDB 模式
  3. 选择“添加硬文件”并选择新创建的文件
  4. 选择“添加目录”

这些驱动器在 Amiga 中将分别显示为 DH0 和 DH1。 RDB 是 Amiga 的原生分区表格式（类似于 PC 中的 MBR，但更丰富）。 设置此模式对于 Amiga 识别磁盘是必要的。

值得保存配置。 转到“配置”选项卡并保存文件。 从现在开始，我们可以启动 AmigaOS：

flatpak run com.blitterstudio.amiberry -f amigaos.uae

安装

我在格式化硬盘时遇到了一些问题。 通常，当安装程序打开时，新磁盘应在初始目录中显示为“DH0：...”。 用左指针按钮单击图标，然后按住右指针按钮以显示顶部菜单栏。 导航至“图标 > FormatDisk”并格式化磁盘。

现在按照安装程序中的步骤进行操作。 有时我们需要“插入新软盘”。 要返回 Amiberry 菜单，请按 F12 并将 DF0 中的软盘映像与安装程序建议的映像交换。 然后单击“继续”并继续。

干得好，我们已经成功安装 AmigaOS！ 我们现在可以取出软盘并启动到已安装的系统。

运行可执行文件

现在系统已重新启动，转到我们安装系统的驱动器，选择“系统”和“Shell”。 二进制 woosh.out 已经位于共享目录中，该目录可作为“DH1”使用，因为我们已将其添加为第二个驱动器（在“Hardfile”之后）。

3.Main:> dh1:
3.DH1:> dir
  woosh.out
3.DH1:> woosh.out
jd was here \o/
3.DH1:>

太棒了，我们的交叉编译二进制文件非常神奇！

远程调试

但这还不是故事的全部。 软件中断，当软件中断时我们需要调试器。 我们已经用 m68k-amigaos-gdb 构建了一个，但系统上没有 GDB 服务器。 m68k-amigaos 工具链的维护者 Stefan Franke 还维护 bgdbserver，这是一个专用于 Amiga 的端口。

在使用它之前，我们需要安装一个工具来提取lha档案。 它可以在这里找到：https://aminet.net/package/util/arc/lha。下载并复制 Shared/ 目录中的 lha.run 文件，然后在 Amiga 中运行它。 lha.run 是一个自解压存档并创建几个文件。 我们对文件 lha_68020 感兴趣。 将其复制到 c:lha。 请注意，c: 不是“C 盘”，而是“命令目录”。

3.DH1:> lha.run
...
3.DH1:> copy lha_68020 c:lha

我们现在可以删除提取的文件并从 https://aminet.net/dev/debug/bgdbserver.lha 下载 bgdbserver.lha。将存档放在 Shared/ 目录中并解压。

3.DH1:> lha x bgdbserver.lha
3.DH1:> copy bgdbserver/bgdbserver c:

现在，我们终于可以在调试模式下启动应用程序了：

    3.DH1:> bgdbserver :4444 woosh.out

灿烂！ 现在我们可以调试我们雄心勃勃的程序了。 在 Linux 主机上，使用相同的二进制文件运行 GDB：

export WORKSPACE=${HOME}/Workshop/AmigaOS
export TOOLCHAIN=${WORKSPACE}/amiga-gcc-toolchain
export PATH=${TOOLCHAIN}/bin:${PATH}
m68k-amigaos-gdb
(gdb) file woosh.out
(gdb) target remote localhost:4444
(gdb) continue

如果遇到“连接被拒绝”错误，请确保在 Amiberry 配置中启用 bsdsocket.library（如前所述）。

下一个合乎逻辑的步骤是让 AmigaOS 变得漂亮，但这超出了本教程的范围。 我按照本指南详细介绍了该主题：https://lyonsden.net/installing-amiga-os-3-1-4-part-5-finishing-touches/

概括

我们已经成功构建并安装了AmigaOS的开发环境。 我想知道一个积极的 Lisp 黑客可以用它做什么？

资源

在配置此设置时，我主要从以下资源中学习：

  • https://franke.ms/amiga/amiga-gcc.wiki：工具链主页
  • https://github.com/BlitterStudio/amiberry/wiki：wiki 模拟器
  • https://guide.abime.net/wb3.1/chap2.htm：分区指南
  • https://guide.abime.net/wb3.1/chap4.htm：安装lha.run
  • https://aminet.net/：包存储库
  • https://lyonsden.net/installing-amiga-os-3-1-4-part-5-finishing-touches/：详细指南解释如何使 AmigaOS 看起来漂亮
